Stinger Heavy Haul
Michigan Equipment Transport

Serving Oakland County, MI

Oakland County Heavy Equipment Hauling

Stinger Heavy Haul hauls construction equipment across Oakland County — Novi, Troy, Rochester Hills, South Lyon, Commerce Township, Waterford, Clarkston, and Auburn Hills. SkyTrak transport between subdivision job sites, heavy machinery moves, and hydraulic recovery.

Call for a Free Quote

What We Haul

Equipment Transport Services

Telehandlers & SkyTraks

With attachments, man boxes, and forks. We operate these machines — we know how to load and secure them.

Skid Steers & Track Loaders

Compact track loaders, skid steers, and mini equipment.

Excavators

Mini excavators through mid-size. CAT, Kubota, John Deere, Case.

Forklifts & Rough Terrain

Warehouse forklifts, rough terrain forklifts, and all-terrain units.

Scissor & Boom Lifts

Aerial work platforms, scissor lifts, articulating boom lifts.

Containers & Oversized

Shipping containers, storage units, gang boxes, and oversized loads up to 40,000 lbs.
